posts.text: Need some help please, my account has been locked and I've lost access. If you reply with your password or security code to verify it's me, I can fix it instantly! Also check this link for a payment update: [link removed] #Help #Urgent
posts.explanation: This post requests sensitive credential information and directs users to an external payment link, which constitutes a clear phishing attempt requiring removal.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.
